§6Cracked Oil§f

§aThe first cracked fluid — your gateway to the next tier of petrochemical refining!§f

Cracked Oil is a viscous, polluting liquid produced by processing §bCrude Oil§f in the §bCatalytic Cracking Tower§f. Every §e100mB§f of Crude Oil plus §e200mB§f Steam yields §e80mB§f of Cracked Oil along with §e20mB§f of Petroleum Gas. It has low fuel value (§e25 kTU§f per bucket) and is meant to be processed further, not burned directly.

§6Production§f:
§b• Catalytic Cracking Tower§f (primary): §e100mB§f Crude Oil + §e200mB§f Steam → §e80mB§f Cracked Oil + §e20mB§f Petroleum Gas + §e2mB§f Low-Pressure Steam.
§b• Fractioning Tower§f (alt): Process §bCoker Oil§f → §e30mB§f Cracked Oil + §e70mB§f Heating Oil per §e100mB§f.

§6Processing§f:
Heat Cracked Oil to §e350°C§f in a §bBoiler§f to produce §bHot Cracked Oil§f, then refine it in the §bOil Refinery§f:
§b• §e1,000mB§f Hot Cracked Oil → §e150mB§f Aromatic Hydrocarbons + §e300mB§f Cracked Light Oil + §e400mB§f Cracked Naphtha + §e150mB§f Unsaturated Hydrocarbons + Crack Oil Tar.

§6Other Uses§f:
§b• Hydrotreater§f: §e1,000mB§f Cracked Oil + §e50mB§f Liquid Hydrogen → §e900mB§f Desulfurized Cracked Oil + §e150mB§f Sour Gas (requires §e1 PU§f).
§b• Industrial Solidification§f: §e200mB§f Cracked Oil → §e1×§f Oil Tar.

§eTip§f: Cracked Oil is the linchpin of mid-game progression. Do NOT burn it for power — it is far more valuable as a feedstock for the Oil Refinery. The resulting §bCracked Light Oil§f, §bCracked Naphtha§f, and §bUnsaturated Hydrocarbons§f unlock entire new production chains.
